case_title: BANKERS TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE vs. JONES, JAMES et al

docket_entries.description: SEPARATE STATEMENT OF FACTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANKERS TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, JAMES PICKINGS, CYNTHIA PICKINGS, RUBY STOKES, DON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1451 THOMAS AVE, SF, LEASE FORFEITED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANKERS TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT JONES, JAMES PICKINGS, CYNTHIA PICKINGS, RUBY STOKES, DON

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANKERS TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE HEARING SET FOR DEC-02-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER, CALENDAR OF DEC-02-1997, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER NO OPPOSITION.(N.B. DEFENDANTS APPEARED & WERE ADVISED IN OPEN COURT WITH PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL PRESENT THAT THE MOTION HAD BEEN GRANTED & THAT THEY SHOULD SEEK COUNSEL IMMEDIATELY. THEY HAD COUNSEL ASSIST THEM IN BANKRUPTCY; HOWEVEVER THE STAY WAS LIFTED BY BANKRUPTCY COURT; SEE EXECUTED ORDER.
NOTICE OF RULING AND ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANKERS TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, JAMES PICKINGS, CYNTHIA PICKINGS, RUBY STOKES, DON

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, JAMES PICKINGS, CYNTHIA PICKINGS, RUBY STOKES, DON
